allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'code|cursor|github|gitkraken|sourcetree|node|python|powershell|pwsh' } | Select-Object ProcessName, Id, Path | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -match "node|watchman|sync|git"} | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path | Format-Table -AutoSize)
